---
title: "Research outputs"
toc: true
listing:
  - id: protocol-list
    contents: data/protocols.yml
    template: includes/_outputs.ejs.html
    sort:
        - year
  - id: publication-list
    contents: data/publications.yml
    template: includes/_outputs.ejs.html
    sort:
        - year
  - id: podcast-list
    contents: data/podcasts.yml
    template: includes/_outputs.ejs.html
    sort:
        - year
---
We look forward to sharing publications arising from the work of DP-Next.

## Protocol {#protocol}

::: {#protocol-list}
:::

## Publications {#publications}

::: {#publication-list}
:::

## Podcasts {#podcasts}

::: {#podcast-list}
:::
